hobby.name: Cooking & Culinary Arts
hobby.description: Passionate home cook with catering experience spanning intimate private dinners to large-scale events. Comfortable across a wide range of cuisines including Classic American, Chinese, Southern, BBQ, Cajun, French, Japanese, Korean, Thai, Filipino, and Indian. Equally at home executing a plated beef tenderloin dinner for 20 or feeding a crowd at a basketball tournament.

highlights.item: Backyard pitmaster experienced on offset smokers, pellet grills, and Big Green Egg — proteins include brisket, ribs, pulled pork, chicken thighs, bacon, and salmon
Signature dishes include prime rib with au jus, pan-seared scallops, swimming rama, sui mai, and lechon kawali
Catering experience across private parties, weddings (Filipino/American fusion menus), dragon boat events, and basketball tournaments
Core mastery in Classic American and Chinese cuisine with working proficiency across 10+ culinary traditions

signature_dishes.dish: Beef Tenderloin with All the Fixings
